attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
ID AS ORDER_HOLD_ID,                         
CREATION_DATE,                 
HOLD_NAME,                     
HEADER_ID,
LINE_ID,  
HOLD_ID,  
RELEASED_FLAG,                 
HOLD_APPLY_REASON , 
CREATED_BY,                    
LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
HOLD_RELEASE_REASON, 
HOLD_RELEASE_DATE,             
HOLD_RELEASED_BY,
HOLD_APPLY_COMMENT,            
HOLD_RELEASE_COMMENT,          
'OPL' AS SS_CD,
'OPL' AS GLOBAL_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS UPDATE_DATETIME,
'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HOLDS_DATA STHDR
WHERE STHDR.LINE_ID IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
ORDER_HOLD_ID,                         
CREATION_DATE,                 
HOLD_NAME,                     
HEADER_ID,
LINE_ID,  
HOLD_ID,  
RELEASED_FLAG,                 
HOLD_APPLY_REASON , 
CREATED_BY,                    
LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
HOLD_RELEASE_REASON, 
HOLD_RELEASE_DATE,             
HOLD_RELEASED_BY,
HOLD_APPLY_COMMENT,            
HOLD_RELEASE_COMMENT,          
SS_CD,
GLOBAL_NAME,
CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS UPDATE_DATETIME,
'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_XXOPL_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL EUOOHA
WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
AND LINE_ID IS NOT NULL
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_OPL_ORD_LINE_HOLDS_ALL WIXOLH
				WHERE WIXOLH.ORDER_HOLD_ID = EUOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID
AND WIXOLH.GLOBAL_NAME = EUOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME
)

SELECT 
RANK() OVER 
(ORDER BY 
STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT, 
STHLD_ORD_BK.SS_CD)  +  SMHLD_ORD_MAX.MAX_ORD_HLD_SGK_VAL SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY,
STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_LINE_ID_INT,
STHLD_ORD_BK.SS_CD,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM
FROM
(
SELECT DISTINCT
WIXOLH.ORDER_HOLD_ID  AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT ,
WIXOLH.LINE_ID AS SK_LINE_ID_INT,
'OPL' AS SS_CD
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_OPL_ORD_LINE_HOLDS_ALL WIXOLH 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL 
ON	(WIXOLH.LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT	 or WIXOLH.LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT)
AND NSOL.END_TV_DATETIME ='3500-01-01 00:00:00'     
WHERE WIXOLH.LINE_ID IS NOT NULL AND (NSOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT>0 OR NSOL.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT>0)
) STHLD_ORD_BK,

 (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY),0) MAX_ORD_HLD_SGK_VAL  
  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD ) SMHLD_ORD_MAX
  WHERE NOT EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD SSOH
   WHERE SSOH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT = STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT
   AND SSOH.SS_CODE=STHLD_ORD_BK.SS_CD )

SELECT
ORDER_HOLD_ID,                         
CREATION_DATE,                 
HOLD_NAME,                     
HEADER_ID,
LINE_ID,  
HOLD_ID,  
RELEASED_FLAG,                 
HOLD_APPLY_REASON , 
CREATED_BY,                    
LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
HOLD_RELEASE_REASON, 
HOLD_RELEASE_DATE,             
HOLD_RELEASED_BY,
HOLD_APPLY_COMMENT,            
HOLD_RELEASE_COMMENT,          
SS_CD,
GLOBAL_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_OPL_ORD_LINE_HOLDS_ALL WIXOLH 
WHERE WIXOLH.LINE_ID IS NOT NULL
 AND 
 ( NOT EXISTS
  (
  SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
  WHERE (WIXOLH.LINE_ID =NSOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT OR WIXOLH.LINE_ID =NSOL.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT)
  AND  NSOL.END_TV_DATETIME ='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
  AND  (NSOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT>0 OR NSOL.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT>0)
  )
 OR NOT EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD SMSOLH
	WHERE 
	WIXOLH.ORDER_HOLD_ID = SMSOLH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT
	AND WIXOLH.LINE_ID =SMSOLH.SK_LINE_ID_INT AND SS_CD='OPL'
)
)

SELECT  
   SSOLH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY ,
   WIXOLH.CREATION_DATE   AS BK_SOL_HOLD_DATETIME,
   WIXOLH.HOLD_NAME       AS BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME,      
   NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
   -999 AS CREATED_BY_ID_INT,
   COALESCE(WIXOLH.RELEASED_FLAG,'=')  AS RELEASED_ROLE,   
   WIXOLH.SS_CD  AS SS_CODE, 
   WIXOLH.ORDER_HOLD_ID   AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
   -999 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_INT,
   WIXOLH.HOLD_RELEASE_DATE  AS RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATETIME,
   WIXOLH.HOLD_RELEASE_REASON  AS RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
   USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
   WIXOLH.CREATE_DATETIME AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,  
   COALESCE(WIXOLH.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS SOL_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
   COALESCE(WIXOLH.LAST_UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') AS SOL_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME ,
   WIXOLH.HOLD_APPLY_REASON AS SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT ,
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(WIXOLH.RELEASED_FLAG,'=') ='Y' THEN COALESCE(WIXOLH.LAST_UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN')
   ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS SOL_HOLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
   NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS DD_SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
   WIXOLH.HOLD_RELEASED_BY AS RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT,
   WIXOLH.HOLD_RELEASE_DATE  AS RU_DV_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DT,
   CAST(WIXOLH.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_SOL_HOLD_DT,
   WIXOLH.HOLD_RELEASE_DATE AS SOL_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
   COALESCE(WIXOLH.HOLD_APPLY_COMMENT,'UNKNOWN')    AS  HOLD_COMMENT,
   COALESCE(WIXOLH.HOLD_RELEASE_COMMENT,'UNKNOWN') AS RELEASE_COMMENT,
   CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS HOLD_UNTIL_DATE
FROM  
$$STGDB.WI_OPL_ORD_LINE_HOLDS_ALL WIXOLH
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOL 
ON (WIXOLH.LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT OR WIXOLH.LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD SSOLH
ON (WIXOLH.ORDER_HOLD_ID = SSOLH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT 
AND WIXOLH.LINE_ID=SSOLH.SK_LINE_ID_INT)
WHERE  WIXOLH.LINE_ID IS NOT NULL
AND WIXOLH.GLOBAL_NAME ='OPL' AND SSOLH.SS_CODE='OPL' AND (NSOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT>0 OR NSOL.SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT>0)
AND NSOL.END_TV_DATETIME ='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
